title: The Rajghat Samadhi Act, 1951
full_text: The Rajghat Samadhi Act, 1951 राजघाट समाधि अधिनियम, 1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-41 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 1951-06-29 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Rajghat Samadhi Act, 1951 Hindi Title: राजघाट समाधि अधिनियम, 1951 Long Title: An Act to provide for the administration and control of the Rajghat Samadhi in Delhi. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 07-06-1952 Notification: 7th June, 1952, vide notification No. S.R.O. 1018, dated 7th June, 1952, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, s. 3. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Rajghat Samadhi Act, 1951 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The Rajghat Samadhi Committee. Section 4. Composition of the Committee. Section 5. Powers and duties of the Committee. Section 6. Power of Central Government to make rules. Section 7. Power of Committee to make bye-laws. Section 7A. Rules and bye-laws to be laid before Parliament. Section 8. Validity of acts of Committee not to be questioned by reason of vacancy, etc. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
